rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Motion For Summary Adjudication Filed By Liverpool Lil'S Inc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. and GILBERT "GIL" HODGES' AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re: Punitive Damages DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Compare Notice of Motion 2:1-2 and Separate Statement 2:2-4; 3:13-17.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Liverpool Lils And Gilbert Hodges Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlemen
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. and GILBERT "GIL" HODGES' Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement DENIED. Based on the evidence provided it is impossible to determine if the insurance "cap" is applicable to the Subject Premises (2940-2942 Lyon Street) as described in the Complaint (i.e. to damage caused to both described addresses versus only one address listed in the Lease). In the absence of the "cap", the $75,000 settlement is not in the "ballpark" under Tech-Built. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, RECONTRUST, N.A. and DEUTSCHE BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS continued to February 8, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies shall be delivered to department 501 no later than January 19, 2018 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FAHIMA ZAHIR VS. 18 LANSING STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT 18 LANSING STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for equitable estoppel is sustained without leave to amend. Such cause of action does not exist under California law. Demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the controversy, i.e. what "property interest" Plaintiff is seeking a determination of: (1) exclusive possession vs. ownership of (2) the rooftop common area on which the decks are located or the deck structure. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PEDRO MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT sustained with 5-day leave to amend for Defendant to address all issues raised by demurrer, subject to Plaintiff presenting a file endorsed copy of the Proof of Service of the Order to Advance Hearing Date by no later than 9:00 a.m. on January 10, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 3134 24TH STREET LLC. VS. BRENDA OLIVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT BRENDA OLIVA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)
